title: Ambulance hits cow on N2 outside Mossel Bay
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A Western Cape Metro EMS...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A Western Cape Metro EMS ambulance was involved in an accident on the N2 near PetroSA this morning, Saturday, 31 January.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A Western Cape Metro EMS ambulance was involved in an accident on the N2 near PetroSA this morning, Saturday, 31 January."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Western Cape Department of Health and Wellness said it could confirm that one of its EMS vehicles “was involved in a motor vehicle accident after it struck a cow on the N2 near Mossel Bay”."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to the department no other vehicles were involved and the EMS vehicle was not transporting a patient at the time of the incident.","html":"According to the department no other vehicles were involved and the EMS vehicle was not transporting a patient at the time of the incident."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“The crew members were not injured, but the EMS vehicle sustained significant damage,” it said.","html":"“The crew members were not injured, but the EMS vehicle sustained significant damage,” it said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Ambulance hits cow on N2 outside Mossel Bay
